brand.name: SAS Energy Solutions
brand.vibe: Premium, Minimal, Professional, Corporate, Fast, Awwwards-level, Clean Tech

rules.headings: Tight tracking (tracking-tighter or tracking-tight). Use font-light for elegance or font-bold for impact. Never default to generic medium. Do not center everything.
rules.overlines: Uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em], text-xs, font-semibold).

visual enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-sm (Use for sticky header and floating elements only, optical clarity).
visual enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E2E8F0 for structural grids. No heavy borders.

grids.bento_tetris: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8. Span logic for asymmetry (e.g., col-span-12 md:col-span-8 row-span-2) for Services section.

layouts.spacing: Generous white space. p-8, p-12 for containers. py-24 to py-32 for massive vertical rhythm in sections.
layouts.alignment: Mobile-first grids. Left-align body text, headings can be left-aligned or optical-aligned. Avoid centered symmetry disease.

motion.hero_reveal: Kinetic typography. Framer Motion line-by-line masked reveal. Use overflow-hidden on parent lines, y: '100%' to '0%' on text children.
motion.ken_burns: Hero image scale from 1.0 to 1.15 over 20s ease-in-out to simulate subtle drone/camera movement.
motion.scroll_smooth: MANDATORY: Lenis smooth scroll for momentum.
motion.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion useInView for elegant fade-up + slight translation (y: 30 to 0) on scroll.
motion.hover_states: Micro-interactions: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow increase, color shift.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has gradient overlays (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) or text-shadow.
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., 'get-quote-button', 'contact-submit').
accessibility.aria: Use aria-hidden='true' for purely decorative icons.

media.image_treatment: Premium architectural/product photography. Spotlights, clipped frames, soft edges (rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl).

3d libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion for simple 3D parallax/tilt on cards. Avoid heavy WebGL unless specifically for a floating solar panel asset. Prioritize fast-loading 2D motion.

image_urls.description: Close-up of solar panels and a tiled roof, showcasing renewable energy solutions in architecture.
Aerial industrial building solar harnessing renewable energy.
Aerial view of clean energy wind turbines during a vibrant sunset.
A large house with solar panels on the roof.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette: Primary #0A66C2, Secondary #16A34A.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the main layout/App wrapper.
Hero Section: Build a Kinetic typography reveal using Framer Motion (staggered children, overflow hidden) over a 20s slow-scaling Ken Burns background image. Add a 'signature on-load moment'.
Services Section: Design an asymmetrical 11-card Bento Grid using Tailwind. Create distinct span sizes to avoid boring uniform grids. Include hover micro-interactions.
Brand Marquee: Use 'react-fast-marquee'. Make it slow, editorial style. Do not use standard fast-moving colorful logos; style them clean/greyscale if possible.
Calculators: Use Shadcn UI 'Slider' and 'Card' primitives. Style them minimally and luxuriously with ample spacing.
Testimonials: Build 'Google-style' cards. Clean white backgrounds, subtle shadows, avatar, and star ratings.
All buttons must be pill-shaped or rounded-lg with clear hover states (color darken + slight lift). Use primary blue for main CTAs and secondary green for WhatsApp/success actions.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to every interactive component.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Use layered z-index hierarchy and premium spacing.
Never apply 'transition: all'. Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-transform, transition-colors).
Do not center-align the main App container. Respect organic and optical left alignment for text.
Use 2-3x more padding than usual (e.g., py-24 for sections). Cramped designs look cheap.
Hover states, transitions, and entrance animations are mandatory on all interactive elements. Static = dead.
Never use completely transparent backgrounds under text. Always use glassmorphism or solid fills.
